code:
const API_BASE_URL=process.env.NODE_ENV==='production'?"".concat(window.location.protocol,"//").concat(window.location.hostname,":2345"):"".concat(window.location.protocol,"//").concat(window.location.hostname,":2345");export const metaApi={// Get Meta OAuth URL
getAuthUrl:async()=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/meta/auth-url"));if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to get Meta auth URL');}return response.json();},// Handle OAuth callback
handleCallback:async(code,state)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/meta/callback"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({code,state})});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to complete Meta authentication');}return response.json();},// Get Facebook pages
getPages:async accessToken=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/meta/pages?access_token=").concat(accessToken));if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch Facebook pages');}return response.json();},// Get Instagram accounts
getInstagramAccounts:async(pageAccessToken,pageId)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/meta/instagram-accounts?page_access_token=").concat(pageAccessToken,"&page_id=").concat(pageId));if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch Instagram accounts');}return response.json();},// Post to Facebook
postToFacebook:async function(pageId,pageAccessToken,message){let link=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:null;const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/meta/post-facebook"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({page_id:pageId,page_access_token:pageAccessToken,message,link})});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to post to Facebook');}return response.json();},// Post to Instagram
postToInstagram:async function(instagramAccountId,pageAccessToken,imageUrl){let caption=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:'';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/meta/post-instagram"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({instagram_account_id:instagramAccountId,page_access_token:pageAccessToken,image_url:imageUrl,caption})});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to post to Instagram');}return response.json();},// Get page insights
getInsights:async function(pageId,pageAccessToken){let metric=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:'page_fans,page_impressions,page_engaged_users';let period=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:'day';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/meta/insights/").concat(pageId,"?page_access_token=").concat(pageAccessToken,"&metric=").concat(metric,"&period=").concat(period));if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch page insights');}return response.json();}};export default metaApi;
